_note: SPECIFICATION, not a verified Jira export. Build in the rule builder, then export from Automation and replace this file. See automation/README.md.
name: Warn at 75% of resolution target

conditions.jql: project = OPS AND statusCategory != Done AND status NOT IN ("Pending Customer","Pending Vendor") AND ((priority = "P1 - Critical" AND "Reported At" <= -3h) OR (priority = "P2 - High" AND "Reported At" <= -6h) OR (priority = "P3 - Medium" AND "Reported At" <= -54h) OR (priority = "P4 - Low" AND "Reported At" <= -90h))

actions.body: At 75% of the resolution target for this priority.

whyItExists: Warn while the ticket can still be saved, not after the target has passed. Thresholds are 75% of the P1-P4 targets in shared/domain.py; the Pending exclusion matters.
